title: K-th Smallest in Lexicographical Order
hints: Visualize the numbers as nodes in a 10-ary tree where children of x are 10x through 10x+9.
Traverse this tree in pre-order. Count how many nodes are in the current subtree to decide whether to go deeper or move to the next sibling.
Calculate the size of the subtree rooted at cur within range [1, n]. If count >= k, descend; otherwise, increment cur and subtract count from k.
